name: C.P. Land Surveying
description: Family-owned business offering boundary, topographic, ALTA, and construction surveys across Los Angeles, Bay Area, Santa Clarita, and other California communities with over 50 years of experience.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: They turned around our work in half the time as everyone else, did a thorough and accurate job
CP Land Surveying was very efficient & professional...Excellent!
Their Customer service is super. I highly recommend them.
Prompt and efficient. A pleasure to work with.

sentiment.summary: C.P. Land Surveying has an exceptionally positive reputation with customers consistently praising their efficiency, professionalism, responsiveness, and competitive pricing.
